autostart_dialog_body:
Sicela wenze isizathu sokukhetha okuhlukile ku-HoliCal-App ekhasini lokulungiselela elilandelayo.

Lokhu kuqinisekisa ukuthi izaziso zisebenza ngokuthembekile!
berufsbegleitende_kunst_und_erwachsenenb: Kuphela ngemfundo yabantu abadala kanye nemfundo yobuciko ehambisana nomsebenzi.
calendar_permission_prominent_disclosure:
Lolu hlelo lokusebenza ludinga imvume yekhalenda ukuze libonise izenzakalo zekhalenda noma ligcine amalanga amaholide kukhalenda yakho.

Ulwazi lwekhalenda lugcinwa kudivayisi yakho kuphela futhi alugciniwe ndawo!
color_from_calendar: Umbala uthathwa kukhalenda yedivayisi futhi ungashintshwa kuphela kuhlelo lokusebenza lwekhalenda oluyisisekelo.
enhance_mode_subtitle: Engeza umthunzi wamakhadi ekhalenda kanye nezithombe ezinyakazayo ezikrinini sokuqala. Kungase kube nomthelela ekusebenzeni.
export_description: Khetha ikhalenda ekhona lapho ufuna ukugcina izinsuku zokuphumula.
hoefe_march_alptha-KS_auasserschiwyz_hza: Kuyaqondwa izifunda zakwa-Einsiedeln, Höfe, March kanye noMasipala wase-Alpthal kuphela. Isikole samabanga aphakeme i-KS Ausserschwyz, isikole esikhethekile i-HZA kanye nesikole semisebenzi yezandla i-KB Lachen.
holiday.bulgarianBrave: Usuku luka-Georg / Usuku Lokubuswa Ngesibindi kanye Nosuku Lwebutho Lase-Bulgaria
holiday.bulgarianIndependence: Usuku lweMfundo, iSiko kanye neZincwadi zamaSlav zaseBulgaria
holiday.bulgarianUnity: Usuku Lokuba Nesibindi kanye Nebutho LaseBulgaria
holiday.carnivalTuesday: IKhatholika Lomkhosi Wokuguqula Isimo Sokuphila Kwesintu
holiday.czechStatefullness: Usuku lweZithunywa zevangeli zesizwe samaSlav uCyril no-Methodius
holiday.dayOfRioGrandeDoNorte: Usuku Lombuso iRio Grande do Norte
holiday.foundationOfTheState: Umsunguli wezwe kanye nosuku lwengcwele yabo evikelayo
holiday.mareidanDay: Usuku Lomphakathi Ozenzile weSifunda saseMadeira kanye Nezindlu ZaseMadeira.
holiday.motherGoddess: Usuku Lomama Ongcwele Wezinkathazo Ezinsaba, Uvikelezi WaseSlovakia
holiday.santaCatarinaDay: Usuku lukaSanta Catarina (Ukwakhiwa kwehhovisi leKaputeni, Ukwehlukaniswa kweSão Paulo)
holiday.victoryOverNazism: Usuku Lokunqoba KwamaNazi eMpini Yesibili Yomhlaba
6pmTillMidnight: Ingxenye yeholide kusukela ngo-6 ntambama kuya ku-midnight
7pmTillMidnight: Umgubho ongazange ube umgubho ogcwele kusukela ngo-19:00 kuya phakathi kwamabili.
assumptionDayBavaria: UMkhosi Wokwenyuswa KukaMariya eBavaria uwumgubho wezomthetho kuphela emiphakathini enabantu abaningi abangamaKatolika.
chooseGoodFridayOrEasterMonday: Ukukhetha phakathi koLwesihlanu Olungcwele noMsombuluko wePhasika njengosuku olusemthethweni lweholide.
curpusChristiSaxony: I-Fronleichnam iwusuku olukhunjulwa njengelilodwa lezinsuku zamaholidi zikahulumeni emiphakathini ebhalwe ohlwini lwe-Fronleichnamsverordnung. Kwezinye izindawo zaseSaxony, i-Fronleichnam iyakhunjulwa njengesonto ngokomthetho ngaphansi kweSahluko 3 isigaba 1 se-Sächsischen Feiertagsgesetzes.
curpusChristiThuringia: IFronleichnam ungumkhosi osemthethweni emiphakathini echazwe ngokwe § 2 Abs. 2 kanye no- § 10 Abs. 1 weThürFGtG. 1 ThürFGtG, bheka isihluthulelo somphakathi ngosuku lweFronleichnam.... Kwezinye izifunda zaseThuringen, iFronleichnam ivikelekile njengeholide lezemikhosi ngokwe § 3 Abs. 1 Nr. 2 weThüringer Feiertags- und Gedenktagsgesetzes.
defactoHoliday: Usuku lwesikhashana: akusona usuku lukahulumeni, kodwa abasebenzi abaningi banalesi sikhathi sokuphumula.
free_or_partitial_free_dependend_on_cont: Ukukhululeka emsebenzini noma ukusebenza ngokuyingxenye ngokuhambisana nesivumelwano esibumbene.
goldCupParade: Kuhlonishwa njengosuku olungelona usuku lokusebenza nguhulumeni wesifundazwe nabanye abasebenzisi emkhakheni wenhlokodolobha.
goodFridayGreece: NgoLwesihlanu Oluhle, ukuhweba ezitolo akuvunyelwe ngaphambi kuka-12:00 emini nangemva kuka-19:00 ntambama. Ngokujwayelekile, izitolo zivula ngo-12:00 emini bese zivalwa ngo-19:00 ntambama (zikavuli lonke ntambama kanye namahora okuqala amabili ntambama).
israeli_free_or_partitial_free_dependend: Ukukhululeka emsebenzini noma ukukhululeka okuyingxenye kubantu abangamalungu enhlangano yenkolo yama-Israyeli ngokwesivumelwano esihlangene.
mostBusinessesHaveClosed: Akusona iholide elisemthethweni, kodwa izitolo eziningi zivaliwe.
noHolidayButComonlyObsersvedGovermentFin: Akusona usuku olusemthethweni lweholide, kodwa lugujwa ngazo zonke izigaba zikahulumeni, izikhungo zezezimali nezinkampani ezithile.
northernTasmania: Kugujwa kuzo zonke izingxenye zaseTasmania enyakatho ye (kodwa hhayi ebandakanya) Oatlands naseSwansea.
official_holiday_most_only_schools_and_a: Usuku lweholide ngokwemithetho yezwe, kuvamise ukuba kuthinte izikole kuphela, izikhungo zikaHulumeni kanye nezikhungo zokuphatha.
onlyAugsburg: UMkhosi Wokuthula wase-Augsburg ungumkhosi womthetho edolobheni lase-Augsburg kuphela (hhayi ezindaweni ezizungezile).
onlyMoselleBas-RhinHaut-Rhin: Kwesifunda eminyangweni iMoselle, iBas-Rhin kanye neHaut-Rhin
publicServiceWorkers: Kufunwe umthetho kubasebenzi bombuso. Abaningi abaqashi banikeza abasebenzi babo izinsuku zokuphumula ezingekho ngempela izinsuku zamaholide zomthetho.
retailBusinessesMustBeClosed: Akusona usuku lukahulumeni lokuphumula, kodwa izitolo ezidayisa ngezandla zibophelekile ukuvalwa.
royalHobartRegatta: Usuku lweholide olusemthethweni engxenyeni enkulu yezwe yeTasmania eseningizimu nasempumalanga.
sales_are_allowed_to_work_in_special_cas: Uma usuku luwele esukwini sokusebenza, abasebenzi ezitolo bangasebenza ngaphansi kwezimo ezithile.
schoolsAndSomePublicServices: Izikole nezinye izinkonzo zomphakathi zivaliwe ngalolu suku.
swiss1AG: Kuvunyiwe ngokomthetho uma kungawi ngoLwesibili noma ngoMgqibelo. Isizathu somlando salo mthetho wukuthi ukuze kuqinisekiswe izidingo eziyisisekelo, akufanele kube nezinsuku ezintathu ezilandelanayo ezingenamsebenzi. Namuhla lo mthetho awusalandelwa kakhulu, ngakho-ke kuvamise ukuba khona usuku lokuphumula unyaka ngamunye.
swiss2AG: Akusona iholide elisemthethweni. Kodwa-ke, ezimbonini eziningi, kusetshenziswa kuphela ngaphambi kwesikhathi sasemini. Uma kuwela ngoMsombuluko, cishe yonke indawo ukusebenza kuyema usuku lonke.
swiss1NE_BT: Yamukelwa ngokusemthethweni kuphela uma iwela ngoMsombuluko. Empeleni, kodwa-ke, iBerchtoldstag ivamise ukubungazwa unyaka nonyaka.
swiss1NE_ST: Kuvunwa ngokusemthethweni kuphela uma kuwela ngoMsombuluko.
swissa: Umkhosi osuselwe kweSonto noma olunye usuku olwamukelwa ngokomthetho kuphela eminye yemiphakathi yaseKanton. Nokho, kwezinye izenzakalo ezigujwa kabanzi, kungenzeka kube nezithiyo noma imikhosi nakwezinye izindawo zaleli Kanton.
swissB: Umhla wokuphumula womphakathi owamukelwa ngokusemthethweni kuso sonke isifunda
swissC: Umkhosi omkhulu owaziwayo ngemuva kuka-12:00 emhlabeni wonke eKanton.
swissc: Umkhosi oqokwe ngokusemthethweni ukuthi ube isigamu sosuku (ngokuvamile kusukela ngo-12.00 emini) uwenzelwa izisebenzi zikahulumeni kuphela, kodwa ngokuvamile uyagcinwa yiwo wonke amaqembu abasebenza ngezinkampani.
swissD: Akugunyaziwe ngokusemthethweni, kodwa ngokuvamile kugujwa yizo zonke izinhlaka zezisebenzi esifundeni.
swissd: Akuvunyelwe ngokomthetho, kodwa kugujwa kwezinye izindawo.
whitMondayGreece: Umkhosi woMoya oNgcwele umiselwe njengesikhathi somgubho esisemthethweni sombuso. Ezikoleni ezizimeleyo nasezitolo, kugujwa uma umiselwe njengosuku lomkhosi ngaphansi komthetho, isivumelwano somphakathi, noma ngenxa yesiko nesiko.
ignore_battery_dialog_body:
Sicela uvumele "Ukunganaki Ukusetshenziswa Kwebhethri", ukuze uhlelo lokusebenza luqhubeke lusebenza ngemuva.

Lokhu kuzoqinisekisa ukuthi izaziso zisebenza kahle!

Ngeke kudle ibhethri eliningi, njengoba ukuhlela izaziso ukuphela kwento eyenziwa uhlelo lokusebenza ngemuva.
noWritableCalendarSelected: Chofoza lapha ukuze ukhethe ikhalenda yokwenza okuthunyelwayo kwekhalenda.
onboarding_calendar_select_subtitle: Khetha amakhalenda ofuna ukuwabuka kuhlelo lokusebenza.
onboarding_state_select_only_holidays_su: Khetha isifundazwe sakho, ofuna ukubona izinsuku zomkhosi salo.
onlyLocalEntry: Ngokwesibonelo uhambo, usuku lokuzalwa, njll. (kugcinwa kule app kuphela)
purchase_description: Umthengi wakho awuzukuvuselelwa ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ngemuva kokuphelelwa yisikhathi, kubalulekile ukuthenga okusha ngesandla ukuze ugcine ukufinyelela. Ngokuthenga, uthola ukufinyelela okungenamkhawulo kokubuka wonke amaholidi azayo, nokho, lokhu kufinyelela kuyaqeda ngemuva konyaka owodwa.
purchase_dialog_description:
Siyabonga kakhulu ngokusebenzisa uhlelo lwethu lokusebenza!

Njengamanje unokufinyelela kumaholide ezinyanga ezizayo ezingu-%d. Uma udinga okwengeziwe, ungakhulula wonke amaholide azayo ngezansi.
rate_dialog_1_to_3_stars: Ngiyaxolisa ukuzwa lokho. Yini esingayishintsha ukuze senze uhlelo lokusebenza lube ngcono?
rate_dialog_4_stars: Kuhle! Ngabe kukhona esingakwenza ukuze sithuthukise?
rate_dialog_5_stars: Kuhle ukukuzwa! Ungathatha isikhashana ukuyikala le app?
rate_dialog_please_rate_text: Uxolo ngokuphazamiseka. Sizojabula kakhulu uma ungasinikeza impendulo!
report_edittext_description: Ngiyabonga kakhulu ngokuthatha isikhathi sokuthuthukisa uhlelo lokusebenza.❤️ Sizozama ukulungisa amaholide ngokushesha okukhulu!
school_holidays_available_till_date: Izinsuku zezifundo zihlala zibuyekezwa, kodwa zibhalwe kuphela kuze kube %s ezingeni lamanje.
select_create_event_default: Sicela ukhethe ukuthi iyiphi irekhodi ofuna ukuyakha.
settings_improve_translation_description:
Siyabonga kakhulu ngokufuna ukuthuthukisa ukuhunyushwa kwe-App.

Imizamo yakho iyaziswa kakhulu! ❤️

Izinto ozithuthukisayo zizofakwa ekubuyekezweni kwe-App ezayo.
settings_notification_troubleshoot_andro: Ngeshwa, abanye abakhiqizi bavimbela izinhlelo zokusebenza ukuthi ziqalwe ngokuzenzakalelayo noma zisebenze ngemuva. Lokhu kuyadingeka ukuze uhlelo lokusebenza lukhombise isikhumbuzo seholide. Uma isikhumbuzo singakhonjiswa kuwe, sicela uhlole lezi zinto ezilandelayo:
Bheka ukuthi wengeze yini okuhlukile kwe-App ye-HoliCal ekhasini lezilungiselelo:
Ukuze uqinisekise ukuthi uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-HoliCal aluqediwa ngemuva, sicela uvakashele ku-dontkillmyapp.com futhi ulandele imiyalelo yomenzi wedivayisi yakho.
Kungenzeka ukuthi lokhu sekusethwe kakade, kodwa hlola ukuthi imvume yezaziso inikeziwe:
settings_privacy_policy_description:
Asigcini futhi asilandeleli _MADA_ yemininingwane yakho.  
Ulwazi lwesikhumbuzo sekhalenda nayo yonke enye idatha igcinwa kuphela kudivayisi yakho futhi ayilayishwanga ndawo!  
Kungase kudingeke ukuthi uhlelo lokusebenza luhlolwe yonke imvamisa izivakashi zokuhlola izinsuku zamaholidi ezifanele, okuyinto okumele ithunyelwe ngaleso sikhathi kugcinwa kuseva yethu. Asigcini lezi zinkulumbezi.  
Kunokuba ufunde isitatimende sobumfihlo, thepha isikrini ukuze ugubhe! 🎉  
Uma unemibuzo, sicela uxhumane nathi:  
  
Christopher Wolf - Software-Entwicklung  
Martinstr. 2  
83329 Waging a. See  
IGALESI  
info@holiday-calendar.app
sylt_fhr_amrum_helgoland_und_halligen: Kuphela e-Amrum, Föhr, Halligen, Helgoland nase-Sylt
vsg_neuforn: Kwabafundi besikole samabanga aphansi i-Neunforn kuphela.
select_country_has_no_school_holidays: Azikho izinsuku zokuphumula zezikole ezitholakalayo ezweni elikhethiwe.
select_country_has_partial_school_holida: Kungenzeka ukuthi amaholide esikole atholakale ngokwengxenye kuphela emazweni akhethiwe.
special_count_as_half_holidays: Izinsuku zokugubha ezinemithetho ekhethekile zibaliwe njengo-0,5
notification_problem_text:
Kubonakala sengathi kunenkinga yokuthi izaziso azisebenzi kahle.

Sicela ulandele imiyalelo ekhasini lokuxazulula izinkinga ukuze ulungise le nkinga ngethemba.
notification_problem_hint: Siyaxolisa kakhulu ngale nkinga. Siyazi ukuthi umsebenzi wesikhumbuzo ubaluleke kakhulu kuhlelo lokusebenza. Ngelishwa, abanye abakhiqizi baphelela izinhlelo zokusebenza ngemuva, okuyivimbela ukuthi ibonise izaziso.
create_calendar_subtitle: Amakhasi wamathuluzi AWABO nahaqiziswana ne-akhawunti futhi agcinwa kuphela kule foni.
please_enter_to_confirm: Sicela ufake %s ebhokisini lombhalo ukuze ususe ikhalenda.
delete_calendar_subtitle:
Khetha ikhalenda ofuna ukuyisusa.

Kuzovela ibhokisi yokuhlonza ngaphambi kokuba ikhalenda isuswe.

holiday.DAYOFUPRISINGAGAINSTOCCUPATION-0: Usuku Lokuvukela Emashoneni Ekuthatheni Izwe Ngendluzula
holiday.DAYOURLADYSEVENSORROWS-01: Usuku LweNkosikazi Yethu YeziZine Ezibuhlungu Eziyisikhombisa
holiday.DAYSANCRISTOBAL-01: Usuku Lwesikhumbuzo Sokusungulwa kweSan Cristóbal, Táchira
holiday.FRAMEWORKAGREEMENTPEACE-01: Usuku lokusungulwa kwesivumelwano sohlaka jikelele sokuthula e-BiH
holiday.GENERALMARTINMIGUELDEGUEEMES-01: Usuku Lwesikhumbuzo Sokuhamba Kukajenerali Martín Miguel de Güemes
holiday.GREATPATRIOTICDAY-01: Usuku Lokunqoba Emfazweni Eyisizwe Elikhulu Yokulwa Nobushoshamlilo.
holiday.JOSEDESANMARTINMEMORIALDAY-01: Usuku Lwesikhumbuzo luka-General José de San Martín
holiday.JUNETEENTHINDEPENDENCEDAY-01: Usuku Lukazwelonke Lokukhunjulwa Kwenkululeko Lwange-19 kuNhlangulana
holiday.MAYDAY-02: Usuku LukaMeyi / Usuku Lomhlaba Wonke Lwabasebenzi
holiday.MONCADAGARRISON-01: Usuku ngaphambi kokukhumbula ukuhlasela kwesibaya saseMoncada
holiday.MONCADAGARRISON-02: Usuku ngemuva koMkhosi Wokuqinisekiswa Kwehlaselo Lesibopho saseMoncada
holiday.NEVERAGAINDAY-01: Usuku Lokuzalwa luka-José Gervasio Artigas kanye Nosuku Lokuthi Akuphinde Njalo
holiday.SPECIALADMINISTRATIVEREGION-01: Usuku Lokusungulwa Kwesifunda Esikhethekile Sase-Hong Kong
holiday.UNIFICATIONOFSLOVENES-01: Ukubumbana kwamaSlovenia asePrekmurje nesizwe esizalwa kuso.
holiday.VETERANSDAY-01: Usuku Lwamasosha Asebenzile Namanzi Nokuphepha Emthethweni
nagerObservance: Umkhosi ozikhethela, akukho suku lokuphumula elikhokhelwayo
onboarding_country_select_only_holidays_: Khetha izwe ofuna ukubona umkhankaso wamalanga amalungelo awo.
export_school_holidays_description: Khetha ikhalenda ekhona ukuze ulondoloze amaholide esikole namahelide omphakathi.
export_description_no_calendar_support: Thumela ngaphandle amaholide akho omphakathi njengefayela lekhalenda ukuze angeniswe kukhalenda.
hide_this_holiday_question: Ufuna ngempela ukufihla leli holide? Ungaphinde uliveze kuzilungiselelo.
hide_this_school_holiday_question: Ufuna ngempela ukufihla lezi zinsuku zezikole? Ungazibuyisela kumbukiso kuzilungiselelo.
